textByHash.02e62986ea38542fe5a8de9221a7683e4d1d9d30: I was meant to go down gloriously in the Colosseum!
textByHash.0365791f6785f2df506d3b481781ecdb8b3b2dfc: I just really wanted that dinner in Tal Teklan, you know?
textByHash.1082b76243eed679003eaf9459b5d7a15f570410: So they all sort of... toss me onto this island with a meagre amount of survival objects.
textByHash.138a3724b5a606f6b347496a8c5330033c8a4552: I do see now that I was perhaps foolish.
textByHash.22587cf3be56316dc994dfea3655a982707d9153: This crew were all so very willing to get me where I wanted to go.
textByHash.23b5938c88bdd2b73f782ff163c2b987caf257bf: But fear not! I shan't do that, for it would be improper.
textByHash.2750c63067c0a6811d7b7dc0f2f8d4c49799e363: Though, that is reliant on me not throwing myself into the dark sea first.
textByHash.2a2e1a8cf33372352e3d16e2950513a13e451f70: This isn't how I was meant to die!
textByHash.30a25c599a102cf78019efc20071675a852d1281: Drawn in by their charms, throwing money around.
textByHash.32e0292f09a707147c41dbd05f3d4031fc815ffe: Gosh, it feels as if my skin is just crawling.
textByHash.32e2e1b9bd99d6ea12f71ad625191b39dcd9bb37: A tour to the rainforest, and then dinner in Tal Teklan.
textByHash.39ff1e26167abb61b411ae35d64f8299b4dedaf9: I'd start a fire, if only I had the tools to do so.
textByHash.41e0077fab3f323c99e5299cb920c253bf591fa4: It felt exclusive. I was the only passenger they took aboard.
textByHash.609f5260cc06607b4969388ce81d0018bfb16d4c: I don't suppose you could send for a boat to retrieve me?
textByHash.6235b6c5c7a541c5ae253901047f16fa2994866d: Very helpful as they collected my belongings. Eager, even.
textByHash.7993422afc95b53f4e8c3a4fbd2b05eea2834d89: No! I can't be stuck here! It's far too small.
textByHash.7cac1336c6ab9d7100cca7debe4ba97b03b56524: They will send a search party, won't they?
textByHash.880e277676fb17c7b47a3d84475b2896a94dffcb: So there I was, minding my own business on the boat, when I feel us slow to a halt.
textByHash.8bfef79b0e2b0542d29eec85ac8f37a5afbc9d5c: Yes, this predicament needs excessive force to be resolved peacefully.
textByHash.918c947825896ae5ee62a6d77d2a2dd2fd8f55db: Can you see any way for me to... defamiliarise myself with this island?
textByHash.9dcf8ee19a4ee65a53a3ea074dd31d52fbfc8c94: Either way, there I was. Alone. On this island.
textByHash.9e57b2f18278ef29a706166a3a8809881a14d896: Though if it rains again, I may be tempted.
textByHash.aa1d9858b7ebc6e180bab03f03f52272e3bf1a42: I'm getting rather bored being stuck here waiting for the tide to swallow me.
textByHash.b0a6f856a5a648b8c1327194ca1bb956f532c714: Are you finding the air just chokes you here? It is the air, isn't it?
textByHash.b0f286bf89c47ef03b00fce893942e965cc1122a: Excuse me! Hello! I appear to have found myself in a situation here.
textByHash.b787c45cfc7c29074fc3686ddcfbecca466395ce: Perhaps the bards of Temptestus will write of my sorrow, should they hear my tale.
textByHash.b7a29fc9259cf94e4111bc8e7cd9dac40052a6be: Nobody's going to find me here... I'm going to rot on this island alone.
textByHash.ca91af239815725f0d9daad9aac2e1cd77385229: My regular baker will realise I've not come by in a day. He will send a search party!
textByHash.cef028e7b7cec4ce798c6337d020b455b9c11f5b: Now I'm going to die alone on an island, bereft of my worldly possessions.
textByHash.d474506b4a7e01895d555ee5b5cbe86d31763a5d: I think they were laughing whilst they did it.
textByHash.d9b85b0c153c53280d4ed3095bc2450fbdcafae5: There's myself and the occasional crab, but I've been left here... Abandoned! Forgotten!
textByHash.e2a71c3ad61b60fd64adbfeaa90596ee4d4837d4: This island is too small though... They won't be able to see it.
textByHash.e371da4c7629d7d64a85cdb6f8e560899a019606: Maybe I should pack a flag next time. Claim this land for myself.
textByHash.ef9dbcb86db73f8ce3f7ef5a10a206fa0f4f404c: I'd paid quite handsomely for my passage too!
textByHash.f5e4f25aeab1d4292a903378ab4b3f66e0a77a02: Observe how I have nothing here on this island.
textByHash.fd851ee03194ec11d3cb1ac5d810878923ab230c: This man walks over to me and says that it's my stop, absurd though that is.
